requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Back-Office Integration for Mali EV Charging Projects
requirement_topic.zh: 马里电动汽车充电项目的OCPP互操作与后台集成
requirement_topic.zht: 馬里電動汽車充電項目的OCPP互操作與後台集成

summary.en: Mali does not have a nationally mandated OCPP platform equivalent to Qatar's Tarsheed as of 2026. However, any EV charging project in Mali that is funded by international donors (World Bank, African Development Bank, UNDP, EU, etc.) or that operates as a networked charging service will typically specify OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) as the back-office communication standard, consistent with IEC 63584 and international EV infrastructure procurement norms in Francophone Africa. OCPP enables remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, metering, and demand management — all of which are operationally necessary given Mali's grid instability and the importance of load management at each charging site. The version required (OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1) should be confirmed with the project owner or charge-point operator before equipment procurement. For DC fast chargers, the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack between charger and vehicle is required in place of GB/T 27930.
summary.zh: 截至2026年，马里尚无类似卡塔尔Tarsheed的全国性强制OCPP平台。但马里任何由国际捐助方（世界银行、非洲开发银行、联合国开发计划署、欧盟等）资助或以联网充电服务形式运营的电动汽车充电项目，通常会将OCPP（开放充电点协议）作为后台通信标准，符合IEC 63584及西非法语区国际电动汽车基础设施采购规范。OCPP可实现远程监控、故障报告、访问控制、计量和需求管理——鉴于马里电网不稳定以及各充电场所负荷管理的重要性，这些功能在运营上均属必要。所需OCPP版本（OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1）应在设备采购前向项目业主或充电点运营商确认。直流快充桩须采用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈（充电桩与车辆之间），以替代GB/T 27930。
summary.zht: 截至2026年，馬里尚無類似卡塔爾Tarsheed的全國性強制OCPP平台。但馬里任何由國際捐助方（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、聯合國開發計劃署、歐盟等）資助或以聯網充電服務形式運營的電動汽車充電項目，通常會將OCPP（開放充電點協議）作為後台通訊標準，符合IEC 63584及西非法語區國際電動汽車基礎設施採購規範。OCPP可實現遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制、計量和需求管理——鑒於馬里電網不穩定以及各充電場所負荷管理的重要性，這些功能在運營上均屬必要。所需OCPP版本（OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1）應在設備採購前向項目業主或充電點運營商確認。直流快充樁須採用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧（充電樁與車輛之間），以替代GB/T 27930。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) 1.6 and 2.0.1 — back-office communication for networked EV chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international framework)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
ISO 15118 — Road vehicles — Vehicle to grid communication interface
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility (Mali IEC-aligned environment)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol (CAN bus between off-board charger and battery management system), which is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack required for CCS2. China AC chargers may support OCPP back-office protocols depending on the operator and firmware configuration, but the underlying connector and signaling still uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP required for IEC 62196 Type 2. China domestic EMC compliance is assessed under GB/T 18487.5-2024 and related GB standards; IEC 61000 series test reports from ILAC-recognised laboratories are required for international project procurement in Mali.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2所需的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商和固件配置可能支持OCPP后台协议，但底层接口和信号仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2所要求的PP/CP。中国国内EMC合规依据GB/T 18487.5-2024及相关GB标准评估；马里国际项目采购须提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2所需的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商和固件配置可能支持OCPP後台協議，但底層接口和信號仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2所要求的PP/CP。中國國內EMC合規依據GB/T 18487.5-2024及相關GB標準評估；馬里國際項目採購須提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
GB/T 18487.5-2024 — EMC requirements for EV conductive charging systems

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 as required by the Mali project owner, donor, or charge-point operator; (2) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS2 DC chargers; (3) OCPP back-office integration is tested with the project's chosen central management system before site commissioning; (4) EMC compliance is demonstrated by IEC 61000 series test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory (GB EMC reports are not directly accepted for international procurement); (5) remote monitoring and fault-reporting functions are configured for Mali's grid-unstable operating environment; (6) offline operation and charge-session persistence through power interruptions are supported. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot be integrated into international donor or commercial EV charging networks in Mali.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持马里项目业主、捐助方或充电点运营商要求的OCPP 1.6或2.0.1版本；(2) CCS2直流充电桩将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；(3) 在站点调试前完成与项目选定中央管理系统的OCPP后台集成测试；(4) 通过ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列测试报告证明EMC合规（GB EMC报告不被国际采购直接接受）；(5) 远程监控和故障报告功能针对马里电网不稳定运营环境进行了配置；(6) 支持离线运行及断电后充电会话持久化。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩无法集成至马里国际捐助方或商业电动汽车充电网络。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持馬里項目業主、捐助方或充電點運營商要求的OCPP 1.6或2.0.1版本；(2) CCS2直流充電樁將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118；(3) 在站點調試前完成與項目選定中央管理系統的OCPP後台集成測試；(4) 通過ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列測試報告證明EMC合規（GB EMC報告不被國際採購直接接受）；(5) 遠程監控和故障報告功能針對馬里電網不穩定運營環境進行了配置；(6) 支持離線運行及斷電後充電會話持久化。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁無法集成至馬里國際捐助方或商業電動汽車充電網絡。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor-funded and networked commercial charging projects; OCPP version and back-office platform should be confirmed project by project; IEC 61000 EMC evidence required for AMANORM-conformant procurement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible; China EMC reports under GB/T 18487.5 are not substitutes for IEC 61000 series accredited test reports in international procurement

source.publisher: Open Charge Alliance — OCPP protocol specifications

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office capability and IEC 61000 EMC evidence are baseline requirements for any international EV charging project procurement in Mali. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot be integrated into OCPP-based networks without firmware and communication-stack redesign. EMC test reports must be from ILAC-recognised laboratories using IEC 61000 series methods.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台能力和IEC 61000 EMC证据是马里任何国际电动汽车充电项目采购的基线要求。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法集成至基于OCPP的网络。EMC测试报告须由采用IEC 61000系列方法的ILAC认可实验室出具。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台能力和IEC 61000 EMC證據是馬里任何國際電動汽車充電項目採購的基線要求。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法集成至基於OCPP的網絡。EMC測試報告須由採用IEC 61000系列方法的ILAC認可實驗室出具。
